seed_instruction: Write a thank you email to a professor after a successful internship program.
org_constraint: The phrase "valuable experience" must appear exactly twice in the email.
new_constraint: Refrain from using the phrase "valuable experience" in the email.
instruction: Write a thank you email to a professor after a successful internship program. The phrase "valuable experience" must appear exactly twice in the email. Refrain from using the phrase "valuable experience" in the email.
response:
Subject: Thank You - [Your Name] - Internship Program

Dear Professor [Professor's Last Name],

I hope this email finds you well.

As my internship program at [Company/Department Name] has concluded, I wanted to take a moment to express my sincere gratitude for the opportunity to work under your guidance this [Semester/Summer]. I truly appreciate you overseeing such a meaningful program.

The time I spent learning about [mention a specific area of study or project] was incredibly insightful. The knowledge and practical skills I gained throughout this period have been tremendously beneficial to my academic and professional development. It was an immensely enriching time.

I particularly want to thank you for your mentorship. Your advice on [mention a specific piece of advice or skill] has given me a new perspective on [mention the field]. This whole engagement has provided me with such deep practical understanding of [mention a core concept].

Overall, this entire journey has been a profound opportunity for growth, providing me with immense practical insight into [mention the industry/field].

Thank you again for this wonderful chance. I hope to stay in touch and I wish you all the best in your continued work.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Student ID or Contact Information]<turn|>
